Build Single Comparison Table for Cox PH

Source: R/tbl_coxph.R
dot-get_single_comp_table.Rd

Internal helper function to build a formatted gtsummary table for a single comparison arm. It conditionally extracts available statistics from the subsetted data and stacks them into rows for the final display.

.get_single_comp_table(data_subset, pval_label = NULL)

Arguments

data_subset

(data.frame)
A pre-processed data frame containing the formatted statistics for exactly one treatment comparison.

pval_label

(character or NULL)
The dynamic string to use for the p-value label (e.g., "p-value (Log-rank)")

Value

A gtsummary object containing the stacked summary statistics.

Examples

tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  comparison_label = "A-B",
  hr_formatted = "5.21",
  ci_formatted = "0.25-0.35",
  pval_formatted = 0.005
)
crane:::.get_single_comp_table(tbl, pval_label = "p-val")



  
Characteristic
      
    
p-val
0.0
Hazard Ratio
5.21
    95% CI
0.25-0.35

Contents
